🛡️
1-Year Mechanical Guarantee
Every watch I sell is personally tested and confirmed running accurately before it ships. If you experience a mechanical issue within one year of purchase, I'll work with you to make it right — whether that's covering a service, a partial refund, or a replacement. Normal wear, cosmetic damage, and misuse are not covered.
My reputation is built on repeat buyers — your satisfaction is the point.

Luxury Watches for the World, from Arkansas

In business since 2017, we buy, sell, trade, source, and broker luxury timepieces. With access to massive stocks of inventory worldwide, we can find virtually anything you're looking for — at a fair price, from someone you can trust. Fill out our form and we'll be in touch in a flash.

The Process

How It Works

Buying a pre-owned luxury watch should be simple and stress-free. Here's exactly what to expect.

1
🔍
Authentication
Every watch physically inspected — movement, case, serial number, and documentation verified before listing.
2
📊
Fair Pricing
Prices based on current market data — Chrono24, WatchCharts, and recent comparable sales. No retail markup.
3
💳
Payment
We accept Zelle, bank wire, Venmo, and Apple Pay. Payment confirmed before any watch ships.
4
📦
Insured Shipping
Every watch ships fully insured via FedEx or UPS overnight, signature required. Tracking provided at shipment.
5
🤝
After the Sale
Something not as described? Contact us within 48 hours of delivery and we'll make it right. Our reputation matters.
Recently Sold
A look at our track record — new inventory added regularly

Sell Your Watch

Looking to sell a luxury timepiece? I offer fair, competitive offers based on current market conditions — fast payment, no hassle.

Rolex, Omega, Tudor, Cartier, AP, Patek and more. Box and papers always a plus but not required.

  1. Fill out the form with your watch details
  2. I'll respond within 24 hours with an offer
  3. Accept and ship with a prepaid insured label
  4. Get paid promptly upon receipt and verification
What Buyers Say

Real Reviews

Verified Buyer — Wrist Shot
★★★★★

“I’ve had nothing but exceptionally great service, transaction experience and respect from you and your business. You’re a great professional and a man of your word. Packaging and shipping: impeccable — fully wrapped and protected, right on time. Your personal letter adds a level of personalization that, dealing on the internet, you rarely get. The watch looks like a million bucks — I’m beyond stoked.”

Kenneth Pineiro
Chantilly, VA  ·  Verified Buyer
Verified Buyer — Wrist Shot
★★★★★

“I got it man! Thank you — I have never owned a 34, it’s a little small but it still looks pimp! I want to thank you for making the deal, then for getting it to me so quickly. The package was on point — I appreciate the gift and the nice note as well. The process and experience working with you was absolutely fantastic, and I look forward to doing business with you again.”

Rakib
